description: This file controls special properties that can be added to a monster, based on the game difficulty. The "(N)" text in field names signifies to use that specific value for games in Nightmare difficulty. The "(H)" text in field names signifies to use that specific value for games in Hell difficulty. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Defines the monster property that is reference by other data files.

columns.name: prop1
columns.description: Defines which Property to apply to the monster Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: chance1
columns.description: The percent chance that the related .prop# will be assigned. If this value equals 0, then the Property will always be applied.

columns.name: par1
columns.description: The "parameter" value associated with the related .prop#. Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#)

columns.name: min1
columns.description: The "min" value to assign to the related .prop#. Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#)

columns.name: max1
columns.description: The "max" value to assign to the related .prop#. Usage depends on the property function (See properties.func#)
